name: toolchain advisor: the IaC tool matches the handoff platform (azure yields bicep)
command:
cat > ha.json <<'JEOF'
{"platform":"azure","iac_targets":["bicep"]}
JEOF
bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/toolchain-advisor.sh" --handoff ha.json --out tc.json --now 2026-06-08T12:00:00Z 2>/dev/null
node -e 'const j=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("tc.json","utf8"));const R=j.recommendations;process.exit(R.some(r=>r.category==="iac"&&r.tool==="bicep")?0:1)' && echo iac-matched 1>&2
